creator: smferris@gmail.com
text: Latest patch doesn't work.  SCSI_STATUS_BUSY does RELSIM_RELEASE_AFTER_TIMEOUT | RELSIM_RELEASE_AFTER_CMDCMPLT, and expects a single freeze to be undone by either the timeout or a command completion, whichever happens first. xpt_done_process() for a command completion needs to be able to stop the device callout and xpt_release_device the refcount the callout had, or make the callout do nothing.  I'll see if I can come up with a fix.
